issues.description: Card has non-empty effect text but effects array is empty. '[Your Turn]' trigger with cost reduction for Celestial Dragons characters needs to be implemented.
[Your Turn] text requires duration: 'DuringYourTurn', not Permanent or EndOfTurn

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Your Turn] The cost of playing {Celestial Dragons} type Character cards with a cost of 2 or more from your hand will be reduced by 1.
